summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new RecyclablesShowcase and ServiceSections components. All backend APIs working (8/8 tests passed). New frontend sections render correctly with proper CTAs linking to /pricing and /book pages. All existing navigation and functionality preserved.
passed_tests: Backend API tests (8/8 passed): Root endpoint, Pricing API, Impact API, Booking creation/retrieval, Booking tracking, Contact API, Invalid booking handling
RecyclablesShowcase section renders with all 5 categories (Paper, Plastic, Metal, E-Waste, Clothes)
RecyclablesShowcase 'See Full Price List' button links correctly to /pricing
ServiceSections Household section renders with 'Ghar Ka Kabad? Hum Hain Na!' heading
ServiceSections Factory section renders with 'Industrial Scrap? Bulk Mein Lenge!' heading
Household 'Book Home Pickup' CTA links correctly to /book
Factory 'Schedule Bulk Pickup' CTA links correctly to /book
All main navigation links working (Home, Pricing, Book Pickup, Track)
Pricing page loads with tabs and rates correctly
Track page loads with booking ID input field
Book page loads with multi-step booking form
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (all new features working, minor selector differences in automation)
